name: Easy Fig Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the fig cookies into milk.
2. Add the vanilla-flavored pudding mix to the crumbled cookies and milk.
3. Stir over heat until the pudding bubbles.
4. Remove from heat and stir in molasses, cinnamon, allspice, vanilla, and salt.
5. Allow the mixture to cool.
6. Place the cooled filling into the prepared pie shell.
7. Top with sweetened, vanilla-flavored whipped cream.
8. Serves 6-8.
